item.title: Cadillac Tailfins Stand Out in This Showcase
item.description: This Cadillac is highlighted for its large tailfins, a defining design feature that made these cars memorable. A simple look at the styling and presence of a classic Cadillac. What details stand out the most?

media:content.media:title: Cadillac Tailfins Stand Out in This Showcase
media:content.media:description: This Cadillac is highlighted for its large tailfins, a defining design feature that made these cars memorable. A simple look at the styling and presence of a classic Cadillac. What details stand out the most?

item.title: 1961 Cadillac Eldorado Biarritz Survivor in Topaz
item.description: A look at the 1961 Cadillac Eldorado Biarritz Convertible survivor finished in Topaz, with its original character and distinctive styling. What details stand out most to you?

item.title: 1969 Dodge Super Bee: 426 Hemi V8, 4-Speed
item.description: A look at the 1969 Dodge Super Bee in B5 Blue, featuring a 426 Hemi V8 and 4-speed manual. A classic muscle car with standout color and performance details. What stands out most to you?

item.title: 1 of 5 1969 Cadillac Station Wagon
item.description: A look at one of five 1969 Cadillac station wagons, featuring a classic wagon body and Cadillac styling. A rare find for car enthusiasts and collectors alike. What details stand out to you?

item.title: 1973 Chevrolet Vega Notchback Survivor
item.description: A look at a 1973 Chevrolet Vega Notchback presented as an all-original survivor. This video highlights the car’s original condition and classic compact design. What details stand out to you?

media:content.media:description: A look at a 1973 Chevrolet Vega Notchback presented as an all-original survivor. This video highlights the car’s original condition and classic compact design. What details stand out to you?
